subcodes.first_line: O beloved handmaidens of the Lord! When Amatu'lláh Morvarid arrived at the Sacred Precincts, she bowed in veneration [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیزان عزیز حضرت یزدان امه الله مروارید چون ببقعه مبارکه رسید سر باستان
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @education and the development of capacity, @spiritual transformation, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
